disclaimer: Unified surface map read model for humans and AI agents. Navigation index only — no swap, wallet, or contract logic changes. Retired surfaces link to replacements; legacy NFT pages preserved.

groups.label: Execute
groups.description: On-chain and decision-layer execution surfaces — swap, liquidity, farms, pools, smart execution.
groups.agentSummary: Route economic actions and execution-quality decisions. On-chain surfaces require wallet; execution layer is read-only illustrative.

groups.label: Create
groups.description: Launch, activation, collectibles, and retired legacy creation paths.
groups.agentSummary: Identify creation and listing capabilities. Prefer /launch and /new-project over retired /ilo.

groups.label: Understand
groups.description: Constitutional registry graph — projects, assets, venues, events, presence, query.
groups.agentSummary: Resolve indexed economic context before acting. Read-only registry surfaces with machine manifests.

groups.label: Manage
groups.description: Operational workspace, economic identity, and legacy NFT wallet/market surfaces.
groups.agentSummary: Orient operator identity and portfolio surfaces. Workspace and identity are read models; NFT pages are legacy on-chain.

surfaces.label: Swap
surfaces.humanPurpose: Exchange tokens via the legacy DEX swap interface.
surfaces.agentPurpose: Primary token swap venue — on-chain execution, wallet required.

surfaces.label: Liquidity
surfaces.humanPurpose: Add or remove liquidity from V2 pairs.
surfaces.agentPurpose: LP provision surface — on-chain add/remove liquidity flows.

surfaces.label: Farms
surfaces.humanPurpose: Stake LP tokens in MasterChef farms for rewards.
surfaces.agentPurpose: Farm staking surface — on-chain stake/unstake/harvest.

surfaces.label: Pools
surfaces.humanPurpose: Stake in Sous Chef staking pools.
surfaces.agentPurpose: Staking pool surface — on-chain pool participation.

surfaces.label: Execution
surfaces.humanPurpose: Smart economic execution decision layer — illustrative samples only.
surfaces.agentPurpose: Compare execution-quality candidates before routing to live swap/liquidity flows.

surfaces.label: Launch
surfaces.humanPurpose: User launch and listing capabilities — links to existing flows where live.
surfaces.agentPurpose: Capability index for token, pool, farm, and collectible launch paths.

surfaces.label: New Project / Activation
surfaces.humanPurpose: Economic Activation Runtime — Labs → DEX read model.
surfaces.agentPurpose: Activation stage index for economic presence handoff — no blockchain writes.

surfaces.label: Collectibles
surfaces.humanPurpose: Civilization collectibles read model — BabyMarco Genesis and planned identity proofs.
surfaces.agentPurpose: Collectible class index; mint via legacy /nft/ when indexed — no fake ownership.

surfaces.label: Legacy ILO (Retired)
surfaces.humanPurpose: Legacy ILO pad — preserved for link compatibility only.
surfaces.agentPurpose: Do not route launch actions here. Use /launch, /new-project, /workspace instead.

surfaces.label: BabyMarco NFT Mint
surfaces.humanPurpose: Legacy BabyMarco DNFT mint page (BSC only).
surfaces.agentPurpose: On-chain mint surface for BabyMarco Genesis — prefer /collectibles for read model context.

surfaces.label: Projects
surfaces.humanPurpose: Indexed project registry entries.
surfaces.agentPurpose: Resolve project UPI bindings and discovery metadata.

surfaces.label: Assets
surfaces.humanPurpose: Canonical and presence asset bindings.
surfaces.agentPurpose: Resolve UAI asset identifiers and lifecycle status.

surfaces.label: Venues
surfaces.humanPurpose: LP, farm, and pool venue registry.
surfaces.agentPurpose: Map economic venues to deep links without fake TVL.

surfaces.label: Events
surfaces.humanPurpose: Registry-indexed economic events.
surfaces.agentPurpose: Timeline and event slug resolution for graph bindings.

surfaces.label: Graph
surfaces.humanPurpose: Constitutional registry graph explorer.
surfaces.agentPurpose: Traverse project → asset → venue → event relationships.

surfaces.label: Query
surfaces.humanPurpose: Registry query console.
surfaces.agentPurpose: Structured query surface over indexed registry records.

surfaces.label: Presence
surfaces.humanPurpose: Economic presence targets — not Canonical Economy.
surfaces.agentPurpose: Distinguish canonical MARCO on BNB from presence-only deployments.

surfaces.label: Workspace
surfaces.humanPurpose: User economic workspace — operational center for indexed activity.
surfaces.agentPurpose: Aggregate section links across registry modules — no fake balances.

surfaces.label: Identity
surfaces.humanPurpose: Economic identity console — not social profile or KYC.
surfaces.agentPurpose: Archetype and agent-readiness index without wallet holdings.

surfaces.label: NFT Wallet View
surfaces.humanPurpose: View owned BabyMarco NFTs in connected wallet.
surfaces.agentPurpose: Legacy wallet NFT inventory — on-chain reads, not indexed in collectibles read model.

surfaces.label: NFT Market
surfaces.humanPurpose: Buy and sell BabyMarco NFTs on legacy marketplace.
surfaces.agentPurpose: Legacy NFT market surface — on-chain list/buy flows.

surfaces.label: Surface Map
surfaces.humanPurpose: This unified navigation and surface map.
surfaces.agentPurpose: Canonical route index for all Melega DEX surfaces — start here for orientation.
